profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk, together with its subsidiary, engages in the wholesale and retail trading of electronics equipment in Indonesia. It operates through Electronic and Furniture segments. The company is involved in the retail trade of computers and its equipment, telecommunications equipment, and audio and video equipment, as well as furniture, household electrical equipment, and lighting equipment and accessories. It also provides repairs and maintenance of cars and motorcycles. PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk was founded in 2004 and is based in Surabaya, Indonesia.
